name: Lexicographer Review (Penny Hands, 2026-06-13)
short_description: Independent lexicographer review by Penny Hands of 363 suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved on 2026-06-13 via the marureview.com tool under the shared 'one sense by default' brief with a typed cannot_answer taxonomy.
size_description: 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items (one JSON file with `saved_at`, `total_items`, `reviewed`, `verdicts`; each verdict carries `instance_id`, `chosen_sense_keys`, a typed `cannot_answer` list whose on-disk values are `__no_sense_applies__`, `__inventory_inadequate__`, `__input_defective__`, plus `cannot_answer_notes` and `comment`). 31 items carry a non-empty `cannot_answer` flag (10 `__no_sense_applies__`, 20 `__inventory_inadequate__`, 2 `__input_defective__`); 20 verdicts pick more than one sense. The annotation protocol is documented in the reviewer brief at https://marureview.com/brief, mirrored in `sources/reviews/protocols/marureview-brief-2026-05-26.md`.

files.description: Penny Hands' 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved 2026-06-13 via the marureview.com tool
